code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut first_even = true
mut first_odd = true
for tok in tokens
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    if n % 2 == 0
      if first_even
        evens = "#{n}"
        first_even = false
      else
        evens = "#{evens} #{n}"
      end
    else
      if first_odd
        odds = "#{n}"
        first_odd = false
      else
        odds = "#{odds} #{n}"
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
